mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO ops_wm_order_task( wm_order_id, wm_order_type, task_type, flag, retry_num, msg, cre_time, creator, modify_time, modifier, priority,delflag,sent_success_time) values
( #{item.wmOrderId,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.wmOrderType,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.taskType,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.flag,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{item.retryNum,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{item.msg,jdbcType=NVARCHAR}, #{item.creTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{item.creator,jdbcType=NVARCHAR}, #{item.modifyTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{item.modifier,jdbcType=NVARCHAR}, #{item.priority,jdbcType=INTEGER} , #{item.delflag,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{item.sentSuccessTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP})
